data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for an audit trail of exports, but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations regarding this requirement. The linked use case explicitly states the need for an audit trail, yet there is no evidence of its implementation or validation in the current saga run. This indicates a clear gap in coverage for the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of an audit trail for exports.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Implement audit trail logging
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Ensure that all export actions log the user and timestamp.
